differentials.name: Mastoid antrum [mastos, Greek = woman's breast; eidos, Greek = form / shape]; [oeides, Greek = like;
differentials.raw: Mastoid antrum [mastos, Greek = woman's breast; eidos, Greek = form / shape]; [oeides, Greek = like;

differentials.name: Aditus ad antrum connects epitympanum
differentials.raw: Aditus ad antrum connects epitympanum (= attic) of middle ear cavity to mastoid antrum [ad + ire, Latin = to go to; aditus, Latin = entrance] [tympanum, Latin / tympanon, Greek = drum]

differentials.name: Körner septum =  small bony projection extending inferiorly from roof of mastoid antrum as part of petrosquamosal suture between lateral + medial mastoid air cells posteriorly from epitympanum
differentials.raw: Körner septum =  small bony projection extending inferiorly from roof of mastoid antrum as part of petrosquamosal suture between lateral + medial mastoid air cells posteriorly from epitympanum

differentials.name: Tegmen tympani [tegmina, Latin (pl) = covering structure or roof] =  roof of tympanic cavity
differentials.raw: Tegmen tympani [tegmina, Latin (pl) = covering structure or roof] =  roof of tympanic cavity

differentials.name: Arcuate eminence =  prominence of bone over superior semicircular canal
differentials.raw: Arcuate eminence =  prominence of bone over superior semicircular canal

differentials.name: Otic capsule = densest portion of temporal bone that surrounds osseous labyrinth
differentials.raw: Otic capsule = densest portion of temporal bone that surrounds osseous labyrinth

differentials.name: Petrous apex =  separated from clivus by petrooccipital fissure + foramen lacerum
differentials.raw: Petrous apex =  separated from clivus by petrooccipital fissure + foramen lacerum

context: mastoeides, Greek = resembling a nipple] [antron, Greek / antrum, Latin = cave]
